benefits.description: Ostarine significantly helped wrist and elbow pain during a 4-week cycle cut short due to lockdown.

protocol_notes: User suffering from severe fibromyalgia for many years. Had unsuccessful shoulder operation. Currently managing joint pain with glucosamine, MSM, chondroitin with limited success. Completed partial ostarine cycle (ended early due to COVID lockdown and gym closure). Seeking advice on BPC-157 for joint/tendon pain and ordered 2 vials from a UK source. No BPC usage reported yet at time of post.
